name: Eggnog Waffles
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Chopped nutmeats (pecans or English walnuts)
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift together the flour, baking powder, baking soda, and salt.
2. In a large bowl, combine the eggs, eggnog, and vegetable oil.
3. Add the sifted dry ingredients to the wet ingredients and mix until smooth.
4. Gently fold in the chopped nutmeats (pecans or English walnuts).
5. Pour the batter into a preheated waffle iron.
6. Cook until steam no longer escapes from the grid, then remove from the iron.
